Interface ITerrainDataSource

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.GeoDatabaseExtensions
Assembly
ESRI.Server.GeoDatabaseExtensions.dll

Provides access to members of Terrain Data Source.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("4D228018-1EC1-4FCC-9646-9C6A67F9EF3C")]
public interface ITerrainDataSource

Properties

ApplyToOverviewTerrain

Indicates if the 'breakline' data source should be added to the overview Terrain.

bool ApplyToOverviewTerrain { get; set; }

Property Value

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

Embedded

Indicates whether or not the data source is contained by the terrain.

bool Embedded { get; }

Property Value

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

FeatureClassID

The unique database identifier for the feature class.

int FeatureClassID { get; set; }

Property Value

int

Examples

Sample Snippet

GroupID

The identifier of the terrain's thematic group to which this feature class belongs.

int GroupID { get; set; }

Property Value

int

Examples

Sample Snippet

HeightField

The database column providing heights for the features.

string HeightField { get; set; }

Property Value

string

Examples

Sample Snippet

SurfaceFeatureType

Indicates how the features are used to define the terrain surface.

esriTinSurfaceType SurfaceFeatureType { get; set; }

Property Value

esriTinSurfaceType

Examples

Sample Snippet

TagValueField

The database column providing tag values for TIN elements derived from the terrain.

string TagValueField { get; set; }

Property Value

string

Examples

Sample Snippet

Methods

QueryResolutionBounds(out double, out double)

Returns the lower and upper resolution bounds in which the line/area data source participates in the triangulation.

void QueryResolutionBounds(out double pLowerBound, out double pUpperBound)

Parameters

pLowerBound double
pUpperBound double

Examples

Sample Snippet

SetResolutionBounds(double, double)

Sets the lower and upper resolution bounds in which the line/area data source participates in the triangulation.

void SetResolutionBounds(double lowerBound, double upperBound)

Parameters

lowerBound double
upperBound double
